title: Chew Hunts Usopp
description: On pages 2–5, chew hunts usopp focuses on Usopp, Chew, Nami, Arlong as usopp is forced into a one-on-one fight against Chew and struggles between fear, lies, and real courage.
scene: On pages 2–5, chew hunts usopp focuses on Usopp, Chew, Nami, Arlong as usopp is forced into a one-on-one fight against Chew and struggles between fear, lies, and real courage.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: KUROB1...

dialogue.speaker: Hatchan
dialogue.text: Hachi...

dialogue.speaker: Kuroobi
dialogue.text: small fries will be small fries.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Looks like this game is ours for the taking.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'm not sure if this is the same thing.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: How dare you do this to my brethren...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: But you're getting too cocky if you think you've already won!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hey, what did you mean,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Shens

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: When you said Luffy was half- fine?

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyashi villagers
dialogue.text: It means he won't die for the time being.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: But I'll still have to make one more trip down to the ocean floor.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: But it seems like,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: He's not going to let us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ONG

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Amazing... they actually managed to take down two of Arlong's officers...!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: BUHA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Huff huff... damn it, I can't seem to hold my breath long enough!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Gen, switch with me! I'll do it this time!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: He's already coughed up some water. We're almost there!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: What's the situation over there...!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's fine, no one on our side has died yet...! And not only that...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It may be almost too much to believe,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: because those fishmen have robbed us of our hope until now but...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: with this fight,

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: I'm starting to believe that there's still hope for us all...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: CHU()... that was more trouble than it was worth.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: How the heck can he run away so fast...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But that still wasn't enough to save you. A quick death from a single blast of my water gun...

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
